assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Response recommends REGULAR channel instead of STABLE or Extended, which provides less stability for long-running training workloads

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Response uses 'NO_UPGRADES' scope which blocks all upgrades including security patches, rather than the more nuanced 'no minor or node upgrades' that would allow CP security patches

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Response sets daily maintenance window at 02:00 rather than a narrow weekend-only window for more predictable scheduling

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Response clearly shows separate node pools: h100_training_pool for training workloads and inference_pool for serving workloads with different configurations

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly sets auto_upgrade = false for H100 training pool and includes detailed manual upgrade workflow with controlled migration process

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Response includes specific checkpointing configuration with CHECKPOINT_INTERVAL and CHECKPOINT_PATH environment variables and persistent storage setup

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Response mentions gpu_driver_version = 'DEFAULT' but does not address the need for testing GPU driver versions in staging before production deployment

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GPUDirect/RDMA networking requirements or the need to verify version compatibility for these specialized networking features
